creator: cy@FreeBSD.org
text:
pkg-plist broken for aarch64. Likely for others. pkg-plist in patch only provided for amd64. This will need rework before exp-run. I will take ownership of this PR and fix all build issues.

Sample aarch64 output:

====> Checking for pkg-plist issues (check-plist)
===> Parsing plist
===> Checking for items in STAGEDIR missing from pkg-plist
===> Checking for items in pkg-plist which are not in STAGEDIR
===> No pkg-plist issues found (check-plist)
